action_boundary: Should the FX settlement instruction be released with the stated variance?
communication_boundary: A visible variance is not enough. Compare the variance to the written tolerance and settlement memo.

documents.text: Settlement instruction FX-SET-209 requests release of EUR 43210 equivalent after conversion.
FX calculation CALC-FX-209 shows a USD 0.74 variance between the bank quote and treasury worksheet.
Treasury tolerance memo TOL-FX-209 permits conversion variance up to USD 1.00 for this settlement class.
Treasury approval APP-FX-209 binds FX-SET-209, CALC-FX-209, and TOL-FX-209.
FX settlement release requires approval and any conversion variance to be inside the written tolerance memo.
